simple_types.name: CTRLB_CSMODESelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB_CSMODESelect is
   NORELOAD,
   LASTXFER,
   SYSTEMATICALLY)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: NORELOAD
enumeration_literals.description:
The chip select is deasserted when the bit LASTXFER is written at 1 and the
character written in TD has been transferred.

enumeration_literals.name: LASTXFER
enumeration_literals.description: The chip select is deasserted systematically after each transfer.

simple_types.name: CTRLB_DATALENSelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB_DATALENSelect is
   Val_8BITS,
   Val_9BITS,
   Val_10BITS,
   Val_11BITS,
   Val_12BITS,
   Val_13BITS,
   Val_14BITS,
   Val_15BITS,
   Val_16BITS)
  with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: CTRLB_MODESelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB_MODESelect is
   SPI,
   MEMORY)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: INSTRFRAME_ADDRLENSelect
simple_types.code:
type INSTRFRAME_ADDRLENSelect is
   Val_24BITS,
   Val_32BITS)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: INSTRFRAME_OPTCODELENSelect
simple_types.code:
type INSTRFRAME_OPTCODELENSelect is
   Val_1BIT,
   Val_2BITS,
   Val_4BITS,
   Val_8BITS)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: INSTRFRAME_TFRTYPESelect
simple_types.code:
type INSTRFRAME_TFRTYPESelect is
   READ,
   READMEMORY,
   WRITE,
   WRITEMEMORY)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: READ
enumeration_literals.description:
Read data transfer from the serial memory.If enabled, scrambling is
performed.Read at random location (fetch) in the serial flash memory is
possible.

enumeration_literals.name: READMEMORY
enumeration_literals.description: Write transfer into the serial memory.Scrambling is not performed.

enumeration_literals.name: WRITE
enumeration_literals.description:
Write data transfer into the serial memory.If enabled, scrambling is
performed.

simple_types.name: INSTRFRAME_WIDTHSelect
simple_types.code:
type INSTRFRAME_WIDTHSelect is
   SINGLE_BIT_SPI,
   DUAL_OUTPUT,
   QUAD_OUTPUT,
   DUAL_IO,
   QUAD_IO,
   DUAL_CMD,
   QUAD_CMD)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: SINGLE_BIT_SPI
enumeration_literals.description:
Instruction: Single-bit SPI / Address-Option: Single-bit SPI / Data: Dual
SPI

enumeration_literals.name: DUAL_OUTPUT
enumeration_literals.description:
Instruction: Single-bit SPI / Address-Option: Single-bit SPI / Data: Quad
SPI

enumeration_literals.name: QUAD_OUTPUT
enumeration_literals.description: Instruction: Single-bit SPI / Address-Option: Dual SPI / Data: Dual SPI

enumeration_literals.name: DUAL_IO
enumeration_literals.description: Instruction: Single-bit SPI / Address-Option: Quad SPI / Data: Quad SPI

enumeration_literals.name: QUAD_IO
enumeration_literals.description: Instruction: Dual SPI / Address-Option: Dual SPI / Data: Dual SPI

enumeration_literals.name: DUAL_CMD
enumeration_literals.description: Instruction: Quad SPI / Address-Option: Quad SPI / Data: Quad SPI

variables.name: QSPI_Periph
variables.code:
QSPI_Periph : aliased QSPI_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => QSPI_Base;
